ab: kahiya’ yako ki yaba rima’ payrarongaw hi mama’ ma’an.
ch: 昨天我和爸爸去拜訪我的叔叔。
en: Yesterday, my father and I visited my uncle.

ab: siya mayaka:i’ ’iniya’om, ray taew’an sinakeban maehtang ila.
ch: 他告訴我們，房子的屋頂破了一個洞。
en: He told us that there was a hole in the roof of his house.

ab: siya ’am tal’izaeh ka sinakeban, ’inray sinakeban Saehae’ ila.
ch: 他在修理屋頂時，從屋頂摔下來了。
en: He fell off the roof while repairing it.

ab: yaba’ maraS ka katin ’ayam ki pinlong ’ini mama’.
ch: 爸爸帶了牛肉和檳榔給叔叔。
en: My father brought beef and betel nuts for my uncle.

ab: yako ki mama’ ray pino’azis ’a’iyalatar, siya paSekla’ ’akoey ka kinbazae’an.
ch: 我和叔叔在房間裡聊天，他分享了很多故事。
en: My uncle and I chatted in the room, and he shared many stories.

ab: yako ’am rasiwazay ila, mama’ romokor ’iyakin komoSa’ So’o ’ibabaw ila, ma’ tomal a tomal ila.
ch: 我要離開前，叔叔誇我長高了，也變得更帥氣了。
en: Before I left, my uncle praised me for growing taller and becoming more handsome.

ab: yako Sa:, “So: mama’ ’ae’ay, kayzaeh ila ’isa:a’ wa:i’ ila panpanra:an kanniya’om ray taew’an.”
ch: 我說：「等叔叔腳好了，下次也來我們家走走。」
en: I said, "When your foot gets better, come to our house next time and visit us."
